metadata.title:
BIG BATCH
Of SEWERS


|NSEC0NO

Resolution for Wholesale
Undertaking Presented


by Shaefer.

ASKS PLANS DRAWN

pages.raw_text:
Wholesale sewer improvements are
planned for the Second ward during
the present year. Councilman Shaefer
today filed bls. lkeG resolution with
the city clerk asking the city council
to request the board Of public works
to prepare plans fer nearly a scora
of sewer improvements.


BY proceeding by resolution the
necessity of securing the signatures
of property owners to pcti lions is
done away with. The sewer jobs con-
telnplated are:


Seventh avenue, Lincoln to $50
feet west of Monroe, and from Dvi-
sion to Mcclellan; Sixth avenue, Pine
to Browne: Fifth avenue, Mcclellan
to Bernard. and Bernard to Wash
ington; Fourth avenue, Bernard to
Washington: Ninth avenue, McClel-
Ian to Bernard: Lincoln street. Ninth
to Cliff avenue; Brock street, Ninth
to Norman; Monroe street. Ninth to
Norman: Twelfth avenue. from lot
10. block 8. Cliff Park addition, to
Cliff avenue; Thirteenth avenue,
Wall to Monroe: Gotta avenue. Ste
vens to Wall; Mcclellan street.
Twelfth to Fourteenth avenues;
Browne street, Thirteenth to Four
teenth avenues.
